main.description: A single round of EPTSS — the lifecycle from signup through listening party for one chosen song.

project.description: AT-URI of the site.eptss.project record this round belongs to.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier scoped to the project (e.g. round number or theme).

song.description: AT-URI of the site.eptss.song record chosen for this round. Absent until selection completes.

playlistUrl.description: Link to the round's listening-party playlist (e.g. Spotify, YouTube).

signupOpens.description: When participants can begin nominating songs.

votingOpens.description: When voting on nominated songs begins.

coveringBegins.description: When the chosen song is announced and covering work begins.

coversDue.description: Deadline for submission of finished covers.

listeningParty.description: When all submitted covers are listened to together.
